description_long: This is a cup-style ramen container with a white exterior, decorated with a red horizontal stripe and a band of yellow dashes encircling the upper portion. The container is filled with light-colored noodles that are visible at the top, partially covered by a pair of wooden chopsticks resting across the rim. The bowl has a slightly tapered cylindrical shape, wider at the top and narrowing toward the base, with a subtle faceted design. The lower portion of the bowl features a dark gray band, adding contrast to the overall appearance. The chopsticks are positioned either vertically or horizontally across the bowl in different views, suggesting they are made of unfinished wood.
description: A white, cup-shaped ramen bowl with red and yellow decorative bands, filled with noodles and topped with wooden chopsticks.
description_view_0: The ramen bowl is seen from the front with chopsticks standing vertically, partially inserted into the noodles.
description_view_1: The bowl is viewed from the side, with chopsticks resting horizontally across the rim, fully spanning the opening.
description_view_2: Similar to view 0, the chopsticks are vertical and centered, but the angle is slightly offset, showing more of the bowl's right side.
description_view_3: The bowl is seen from the opposite side of view 1, again with chopsticks lying horizontally across the top.
attribute_bowl_design: The bowl is made of paper or thin plastic, with a white base color and a wide, slightly faceted cylindrical shape. It features a bold red stripe and a band of yellow dash patterns near the rim, with a dark gray band at the bottom for contrast. The rim is straight and unadorned, giving the bowl a clean, modern look.
attribute_topping_arrangement: The noodles are the primary visible topping, densely packed and covering most of the surface, with no distinct separation or arrangement of additional toppings. The chopsticks rest either vertically or horizontally on top, but no other toppings are visually organized or grouped.
attribute_noodle_visibility: The noodles are prominently displayed above the broth, forming a visible mound at the top of the bowl and only partially submerged.
attribute_broth_clarity: The broth appears mostly opaque, with a light brown color and no visible floating particles or oil, suggesting a cloudy or creamy consistency.
attribute_utensil_presence: A pair of wooden chopsticks is present, either resting horizontally across the rim or standing vertically in the noodles. No other utensils are visible.
